description.zh: OpenAPI 文档、权限码和接口契约。
description.en: OpenAPI docs, permission codes, and API contracts.

description.zh: 接口资源、权限码和调用边界。
description.en: API resources, permission codes, and invocation boundaries.

description.zh: 平台集成调用令牌，只在签发时返回明文。
description.en: Platform integration tokens; secret is returned once when issued.

description.zh: App 登录 provider 与平台 App 用户的安全绑定。
description.en: Safe bindings between app login providers and platform app users.

description.zh: 通用行政区划或业务区域编码，供租户、机构和人员引用。
description.en: Common administrative or business area codes referenced by tenants, org units, and users.

description.zh: 操作审计和日志留痕。
description.en: Operation audit and activity trails.

description.zh: 平台品牌、主题和登录展示配置。
description.en: Platform branding, theme, and login presentation configuration.

description.zh: 查看当前平台启用的能力包。
description.en: View enabled platform capability packages.

description.zh: 声明式演示数据集。
description.en: Declarative demo data sets.

description.zh: 字典目录、枚举分类和业务选项分组。
description.en: Dictionary catalogs, enum categories, and business option groups.

description.zh: 字典项、枚举值和可复用配置选项。
description.en: Dictionary entries, enum values, and reusable configuration options.

description.zh: 运行错误、异常和排查记录。
description.en: Runtime errors, exceptions and troubleshooting records.

description.zh: 文件对象、存储位置和下载治理。
description.en: File objects, storage locations, and download governance.

description.zh: 登录认证记录和安全追踪。
description.en: Login authentication records and security tracing.

description.zh: 后台菜单和资源入口。
description.en: Admin menus and resource entries.

description.zh: 实例、服务、健康状态和告警摘要。
description.en: Instances, services, health state, and alert summaries.

description.zh: 租户下的集团、公司、分支、部门、团队和门店层级。
description.en: Group, company, branch, department, team, and store hierarchy under tenants.

description.zh: 平台底座运行概览。
description.en: Platform foundation overview.

description.zh: 平台参数、运行开关和能力配置键值。
description.en: Platform parameters, runtime switches, and capability configuration key-values.

description.zh: 平台级 API 与页面按钮权限资源目录。
description.en: Platform-wide API and page-button permission resource catalog.

description.zh: 用于角色分类、治理和授权维护，不直接授予权限。
description.en: Classifies roles for governance and authorization maintenance without granting permissions directly.

description.zh: 角色、权限和授权策略。
description.en: Roles, permissions, and authorization policies.

description.zh: 后台和 App 会话、有效期与撤销状态。
description.en: Admin and app sessions, expiration and revocation state.

description.zh: 系统级配置、品牌、参数和能力配置入口。
description.en: System-level configuration, branding, parameters, and capability settings.

description.zh: 租户空间、隔离边界和区域归属。
description.en: Tenant spaces, isolation boundaries, and regional ownership.

description.zh: 后台用户、账号、组织归属和角色绑定。
description.en: Admin users, accounts, organization ownership, and role bindings.

description.zh: 平台版本、发布记录和运行基线。
description.en: Platform versions, release records and runtime baselines.
